channel.title: Sergey Brin on jamesm.blog
channel.description: Recent content in Sergey Brin on jamesm.blog

item.title: Sergey Brin Interviews
item.description:
About

Sergey Brin is the co-founder of Google and a prominent voice in AI discussion and investment. His perspective on foundational AI developments, the role of open-source models, and the future of human-computer interaction has shaped industry thinking as Google and others navigate the competitive landscape of frontier AI.

Interviews

[2025-05-20] Sergey Brin, Google Co-Founder | All-In Live from Miami

Timestamps:

  • (0:00) The Besties welcome Sergey Brin
  • (0:40) Sergey on his return to Google, and how an OpenAI employee played a role
  • (5:58) AI’s true superpower and the next jump
  • (12:23) AI robotics: humanoids and other form factors
  • (17:07) Future of foundational models and open-source
  • (19:59) Human-computer interaction in the age of AI
  • (31:09) Partner shoutouts: Thanks to OKX, Circle, Polymarket, Solana, BVNK, and Google Cloud

Note: This page will be expanded with additional Sergey Brin interviews as they become available.
